title: Input schema for Synthetic Dataset Generator

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Reddit threads and Quora questions to scrape

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl

minAnswerLength.title: Minimum Answer Length
minAnswerLength.description: Minimum character length for Q&A pairs to be included

includeSubthreads.title: Include Sub-threads
includeSubthreads.description: Whether to crawl replies and nested comments

minVotes.title: Minimum Votes
minVotes.description: Only include answers with at least this many upvotes
